title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 hands-on: Wider is better - Engadget
summary: It’s like a Z Fold and the original Pixel Fold had a baby. That's because slotting in right underneath the Ultra is a new base version of the Z Fold 8 starting at $1,900.
